prompt: Write a warm greeting to a new colleague in five different languages (your choice). After each, add a one-line note about what's culturally implied by the register you chose.
response:
1. English: "Hi there, welcome abroad! We're thrilled to have you join our team, and I hope you'll feel right at home. If you need anything, feel free to reach out!" - An informal and friendly greeting, common in many English-speaking workplaces, creates a warm and accessible atmosphere for a new team member.

2. Spanish: "¡Hola nuevo colega, un placer darte la bienvenida! Estamos encantados de tenerte aquí y espero que te sientas parte de la familia. Cualquier duda o ayuda que necesites, no dudes en preguntar." (Hello new colleague, a pleasure to welcome you! We are delighted to have you and I hope you feel like part of the family. Any questions or help you need, don't hesitate to ask.) - Using 'familia' adds a level of closeness and an almost familial bond, a common sentiment in many Latin cultures. 

3. French: "Bonjour et bienvenue dans notre équipe, cher/chère collègue! Nous vous souhaitons une intégration agréable et productive. N'hésitez pas à me contacter pour toute question." (Hello and welcome to our team, dear colleague! We wish you a pleasant and productive onboarding. Please don't hesitate to contact me for any questions.) - This greeting in French maintains a more formal tone, which is often appreciated in professional settings in France. 

4. Japanese: "こんにちは！ 新しい同僚（とも）さん、ようこそ！ ご入社おめでとうございます。当社で活躍（かつやく）されることを期待（きたい）しております。何か（なに）質問（しつもん）がございましたら、お気軽（きがる）にお問い合わせください。" (Konnichiwa! Aratana dōryō-san, yōkoso! Go-nyūsha omedetōgozaimasu. Ata-sha de katsuyaku sareru koto o kitai shiteorimasu. Nanika shitsumon ga gozaimashita ra, o-ki-garu ni o-toiawase kudasai.) - In this Japanese welcome, the formal and respectful tone is typical of business greetings, showing humility and deference to the new colleague. 

5. Arabic: "أهلاً وسهلاً بكم، زميلنا الجديد! نحن سعداء بإنضمامك لفريقنا ونتمنى لك تجربة مثرية وممتعة. لا تتردد في التواصل معي لأي مساعدة." ('Ahlan wa sahlan bikum, zamīlana al-jadeed! Nahnu sa'idoon bi'inḍimāmuka li-fariqina wicultuna lak tajriba mythriya wamatumia. La tattarid fil
